name: Data Pipeline Designer
description: Design ETL/ELT data pipelines with error handling

agents.name: Pipeline Architect
agents.system_prompt_hint: Design a data pipeline considering: source systems, ingestion method (batch/streaming), transformation steps, data quality checks, error handling, retry logic, monitoring, and destination. Choose appropriate tools/frameworks.

agents.name: Pipeline Documenter
agents.purpose: Document the pipeline design and implementation guide
agents.system_prompt_hint: Document the pipeline with: architecture diagram (text), source-to-target mapping, transformation rules, data quality checks, error handling strategy, scheduling/orchestration, monitoring and alerting, and implementation steps. Include code snippets for key components.

author: agentfactory
